build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(60, 40, 1.5)
STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(8).cutThruAll()
STEP 3: Add raised feature — .workplane(offset=1.5).rect(59, 38).extrude(20)
STEP 4: Create fin base — .faces("<Z").workplane().moveTo(29, -19).circle(1).extrude(4)
STEP 5: Add fins — for i in range(8): cq.Workplane("XY").translate((i*4+2), -19).rect(3, 20).extrude(1.5)
